svg.text: All inter-service events pass through Redis Streams · Consumer groups ensure exactly-once processing · DLQ for failed messages · Phase 2: Kafka migration via IEventBus
instrument_token · ltp · bid · ask · volume · oi · timestamp
MAXLEN≈100,000 · <1s retention · ~50k msg/min peak · no TTL · Decimal prices
symbol · timeframe · open · high · low · close · volume · oi · bucket_ts
underlying · expiry · full_chain[] · iv_surface · pcr · max_pain · updated_at
MAXLEN≈1,000 · 60s interval · REST full chain + WS per-strike merge · ~60s TTL consumer-side
symbol · timeframe · rsi · ema · macd · atr · vwap · bb_width · computed_at
MAXLEN≈5,000 · 10min retention · published after each candle close
symbol · regime · vix · trend_strength · regime_changed · prev_regime · detected_at
MAXLEN≈500 · 30min retention · on-change + 15min heartbeat · 4 regimes: TRENDING_BULLISH/BEARISH · SIDEWAYS · HIGH_VOL
symbol · score(-1..1) · confidence · key_factors · provider · is_fallback · computed_at
MAXLEN≈1,000 · 1h retention · async publish from SentimentService · cache miss returns neutral immediately
signal_id · symbol · direction · strategy · score · state=EVALUATED · score_breakdown(JSONB)
MAXLEN≈5,000 · 30min retention · one message per strategy-symbol-direction combo per candle
signal_id · symbol · direction · score(0-100) · confidence(0-100) · weight_version · expires_at
MAXLEN≈2,000 · 30min retention · dedup key enforced: symbol+direction+weight_version
signal_id · symbol · instrument_id · recommended_qty · confidence · valid_until · risk_check_ms
MAXLEN≈500 · 30min retention · OMS is sole consumer · discard after valid_until · ★ Critical stream
MAXLEN≈2,000 · 1h retention · risk_decisions table write + alert if consecutive rejections >3
order_id · signal_id · broker_order_id · symbol · quantity · order_type · state=PENDING
MAXLEN≈10,000 · 2yr retention (SEBI) → written to orders table + order_events hypertable
order_id · broker_order_id · fill_price · fill_qty · avg_fill_price · fill_timestamp · slippage_bps
MAXLEN≈5,000 · 2yr retention · triggers position update + Greeks recalc + MTM loop reset
MAXLEN≈2,000 · 2yr retention · rejection storm: >5 in 60s triggers kill switch check
MAXLEN≈2,000 · 2yr retention · kill switch cancels all open orders → published for each cancelled order
breach_type · current_value · limit_value · pct_used · account_state(JSONB) · triggered_at
MAXLEN≈1,000 · 24h retention · 50%→warn 75%→paper 100%→kill switch · ★ immediate action required
action (ACTIVATED/DEACTIVATED) · trigger_type · reason · actor · activation_id · timestamp
MAXLEN≈1,000 · no expiry · activates: unsubscribe WS + cancel orders + block OMS · ★ highest priority
service_name · pid · ts · uptime_s · is_market_hours · status (HEALTHY/DEGRADED/DOWN)
MAXLEN≈5,000 · 5min retention · published 30s by each service · Dead Man's Switch watches this stream
refresh_id · records_updated · errors · duration_ms · next_refresh_at · 07:55 IST daily
MAXLEN≈100 · 24h retention · signals WS Manager + strategies to rebuild instrument cache
dlq.market_data · dlq.features · dlq.signals · dlq.orders · dlq.risk · dlq.system
Retry policy: 3 attempts · backoff 1s/2s/4s · failed → DLQ with error context + original message
DLQ monitor: Prometheus counter dlq_messages_total · alert if count > 10 in 5min · manual replay via CLI
publish(topic: str, event: BaseEvent) → str · subscribe(topic, group, handler) → None · ack(topic, group, msg_id) → None · replay(topic, from_id, to_id) → AsyncIterator
Phase 1: RedisEventBus (Redis Streams XADD/XREADGROUP/XACK) · Phase 2: KafkaEventBus (same interface, no application code changes) · Switching = 1 config line change
★ Critical streams: signal.risk.approved, system.kill_switch, order.filled — monitored with Prometheus gauges and P99 latency alerts
Consumer group naming: cg:{domain}:{service} · All groups use XREADGROUP COUNT 10 BLOCK 100ms · ACK only after successful processing · NOACK never used in production
